creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
The new built 1.21.1.4 runs into a segfault:

X.Org X Server 1.21.1.4
X Protocol Version 11, Revision 0
Current Operating System: FreeBSD bpbws41.local 13.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE CENER41 i386
 
Current version of pixman: 0.40.0
        Before reporting problems, check http://wiki.x.org
        to make sure that you have the latest version.
Markers: (--) probed, (**) from config file, (==) default setting,
        (++) from command line, (!!) notice, (II) informational,
        (WW) warning, (EE) error, (NI) not implemented, (??) unknown.
(==) Log file: "/var/log/Xorg.0.log", Time: Tue Aug  2 13:57:57 2022
(==) Using system config directory "/usr/local/share/X11/xorg.conf.d"
(EE) intel: module ABI major version (24) doesn't match the server's version (25)
Mesa: User error: GL_INVALID_VALUE in glTexImage2D(internalFormat=GL_R8)
(EE) glamor0: GL error: GL_INVALID_VALUE in glTexImage2D(internalFormat=GL_R8)
glamor: Test fbo for depth 8 incomplete.  Falling back to software.
glamor: Implementation returned 0x1908/0x8366 read format/type for depth 15, expected 0x1908/0x8034.  Falling back to software.
glamor: Implementation returned 0x80e1/0x1401 read format/type for depth 24, expected 0x1908/0x1401.  Falling back to software.
glamor: Implementation returned 0x80e1/0x1401 read format/type for depth 32, expected 0x1908/0x1401.  Falling back to software.
Mesa: User error: GL_INVALID_OPERATION in glTexImage2D(format = GL_RGBA, type = GL_UNSIGNED_INT_2_10_10_10_REV, internalformat = GL_RGB10_A2)
(EE) glamor0: GL error: GL_INVALID_OPERATION in glTexImage2D(format = GL_RGBA, type = GL_UNSIGNED_INT_2_10_10_10_REV, internalformat = GL_RGB10_A2)
glamor: Test fbo for depth 30 incomplete.  Falling back to software.
(EE) Segmentation fault at address 0x23d1a000
(EE) 
Fatal server error:
(EE) Caught signal 11 (Segmentation fault). Server aborting
(EE) 
(EE) 
Please consult the The X.Org Foundation support 
         at http://wiki.x.org
 for help. 
(EE) Please also check the log file at "/var/log/Xorg.0.log" for additional information.
(EE) 
(II) AIGLX: Suspending AIGLX clients for VT switch
(EE) Server terminated with error (1). Closing log file.
xinit: giving up
xinit: unable to connect to X server: Connection refused
xinit: server error
